title: Fix Explorer ~10s startup delay from Navigation Pane integration
description: Windows File Explorer takes ~10s to open normally after adding navigation pane integration. Does NOT happen when opening from tray icon. Root cause likely blocking VFS operations during navigation pane enumeration at Explorer startup.

title: Investigate: Root cause analysis of Explorer startup delay
Fix: Eliminate blocking operations in navigation pane enumeration path
description: COMPLETED: Added root children pre-fetch during mount initialization in both WinFsp (winfsp_fs.rs) and FUSE (mount.rs) backends. After seeding root item into caches but before the filesystem starts accepting requests, the mount function calls graph.list_children() to populate memory cache with root children. Eliminates ~10s Explorer navigation pane delay from cold-cache Graph API calls. Pre-fetch is non-fatal. All CI passes (fmt, clippy x2 with -Dwarnings, 234 tests).
